mono.purpose: Financial amounts, address keys, status logs.

shadows.name: teal-glow-hover
shadows.purpose: Active liquidity indicator glow when hovered.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Glowing focus boundary around input cursors.

components.name: Terminal Button Primary
components.description: Solid Electric Teal button with high-contrast dark text and clean hover micro-transform.
components.css: .ds-btn-terminal-primary { background: #00d4aa; color: #080c10; font-family: var(--font-sans), sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; padding: 12px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; transition: all 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-terminal-primary:hover { background: #00b38f; box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(0, 212, 170, 0.3); } .ds-btn-terminal-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Terminal Card Container
components.description: Grid-separated dark card reflecting a Bloomberg Terminal widget layout.
components.css: .ds-terminal-card { background: #0d131a; border: 1px solid #1a2330; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; transition: all 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-terminal-card:hover { border-color: #00d4aa; box-shadow: 0 0 24px rgba(0, 212, 170, 0.15); } .ds-tc-label { font-family: var(--font-sans), sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-tc-amount { font-family: var(--font-mono), monospace; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: #f1f5f9; }

narrative.overview: The TrusTrove interface is modeled on professional financial execution environments (Bloomberg Terminal, Reuters Eikon). It avoids consumer-grade DeFi trends in favor of high-density data, sharp typography contrast, and immediate functional feedback. Surfaces use a dark navy-black void background (#080c10) with thin slate borders (#1a2330) to establish a clear architectural grid.
keyCharacteristics: Deep space backgrounds (#080c10) with flat containers (#0d131a).
High text-density tables, stats rolls, and timeline tracking.
Inter for UI controls and labels; JetBrains Mono for monetary values, addresses, and hashes.
Hover states project a bright teal glow (0 0 24px rgba(0,212,170,0.15)) representing active liquidity.

rules.name: The State Map Rule
rules.body: The INVOICE STATUS COLOR MAP must be implemented uniformly across the entire app interface.

rules.name: The Flat Grid Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat and share the same visual plane. Hover states do not raise cards; they activate the teal border and emit a glowing aura to denote active liquidity.

dos: Do format all financial figures in JetBrains Mono with comma separators and the USDC suffix (e.g. 50,000.00 USDC).
Do display address strings in monospace, truncated in the middle with a copy-to-clipboard control.
Do implement skeleton shimmers instead of loading spinners to prevent layout shifts.
Do optimize dashboard cards and status timelines for responsive, thumb-reachable triggers on mobile screens (375px+).
donts: Don't use generic rounded buttons or card shadows.
Don't show playful illustrations, mascot graphics, or neon-gradient SaaS bubbles.
Don't hide fees or display calculated yield ranges without displaying the utilization-based formula.
